title: Map remaining command-center implementation gaps
description: Create a durable planning artifact that compares current MAP command-center capability against the 6.13 command-center restructuring notes, marks implemented/partial/missing surfaces, and proposes bounded next implementation increments without editing the TASK-164 code under review.
acceptance_criteria: Artifact explicitly compares current command-center state to 6.13 single-entry/operator-control requirements.
Artifact separates implemented, partial, missing, and approval-blocked work.
Artifact proposes concrete next MAP tasks or implementation increments that do not require touching external CommandCenterUI without approval.
